LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS ABACUS GROUP BUILDES, INC, CHARLES VOORHIS AND DAVID MACPHERSON'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS GRANTED. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO MARIN COUNTY. PER THE SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION OF PETER WINKLER, PLAINTIFFS HAVE STIPULATED TO THE CHANGE OF VENUE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS ABACUS GROUP BUILDES, INC, CHARLES VOORHIS and DAVID MACPHERSON'S Motion For Change Of Venue is Granted. The case is transferred to Marin County. Per the Supplemental Declaration of Peter Winkler, Plaintiffs have stipulated to the change of venue. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H.
